Description: REQUIRES MORE ENEMY VARIANTS (MEV), DEA and EEE. A fork of FC_b23 but changed wave spawn timers, enemy pools, and added minibosses such as:George, Banshee and Solaris. And some more additional enemies like Blimp, Electric Praetorian, Ebonite Praetorian and Grooters to name a few. This difficulty is still up for testing and is supposed to be high t6 or low t6.5.
Name: ENND v1.20

WaveSpawners.Name: Spawns a Dreadnaught helper during Elimination
Spawns a Harvester and Maggots enemy on a 5min timer, cuz why not
Spawns Ebonite Praets on a 140-180s timer
Spawns Electric Praets on a 170-220s timer
Spawns a disruptive enemy on a 150-210s timer
Spawns a Menace on a 150-210s timer
Spawns a group of enemies on a 45-55s timer, starting 25s into the mission
